primary.hoverText: Create Your Own Virtual Receptionist in Under 5 Minutes.

slides.heading: AI Virtual Receptionist for Service Businesses in Australia.
slides.subheading: Never miss a call, booking or opportunity again!

items.title: AI Receptionist - 24/7
points: Answers every call instantly, day or night
Unlimited calls & bookings, 24/7
Call recordings, summaries & transcripts
Professional, consistent service every time
Dedicated business number included
Call forwarding option with clear step-by-step instructions

items.title: AI Appointment Scheduling
points: Fully automated: books, reschedules & cancels appointments
Works seamlessly with Google Calendar, Outlook Calendar & Cal.com
Sends SMS & email confirmations and reminders

items.title: Smart AI Assistant For Clients
points: Answers questions about your services instantly
Explains pricing, availability & directions
Handles reschedules or cancellations smoothly
Customisable personality, friendly, professional, or casual

items.title: Post-Session Tools
points: Add client notes after each appointment
Record voice memos that are auto-Transcribed & Summarised
Upload photos or documents linked to appointments
Build a complete client history file automatically

items.title: Advanced Dashboard
items.description: Your control centre gives you everything in one place:
points: Advanced CRM with client data & history
AI Smart Calendar that is colour-coded & auto-updating
morePoints: Analytics & insights, calls, bookings, cancellations, no-shows, performance
One clean dashboard replaces multiple tools and platforms.
Front-End Prompts, Easily update what your AI says to clients on the phone, website, or chat — no tech skills required.
Fully Customisable Branding, Upload your business logo, set your theme colours, and brand the dashboard to feel like your own system — not just another generic tool.

items.title: Online Integration
points: Website booking widget (simple copy & paste script)
Website Chatbot for real-time answering Queries, booking appointments or conversations (simple copy & paste script)
24/7 online + phone coverage for clients

choseUs.subtitle: Why Choose Us?
choseUs.title: Why Businesses Trust Our Virtual Receptionist
choseUs.description: We combine human-like AI with powerful automation so you can focus on growing your business.

features.title: Always Available
features.description: Never miss a call again. Our virtual receptionist works 24/7, ensuring your business is always accessible to clients.

features.title: Seamless Scheduling
features.description: Works with your existing calendars to automate appointment booking and reduce scheduling conflicts.

features.title: Industry Ready
features.description: A smart solution that adapts effortlessly to any service industry, no matter your niche.

features.title: Branded For You
features.description: Fully customisable to your business - upload your logo, choose your brand colours, and tailor the interface to perfectly match your theme.

features.title: Future-Proof Tech
features.description: Built with advanced AI and automation to ensure your business stays at the forefront of communication technology.

industries.title: Built for all service based Industries
industries.subtitle: Our AI receptionist adapts to your specific industry needs with specialized vocabulary and workflows.

items.title: Physiotherapist
items.description: Your AI manages appointment bookings, reminders, follow-ups, and patient records so you spend more time on treatment.

items.title: Myotherapist
items.description: Automates client bookings, tracks therapy sessions, and keeps your calendar organized.

items.title: Massage Therapist
items.description: Effortless Bookings for Massage Therapists. Relax your clients while we handle your schedule.

items.title: Lawyer
items.description: Your virtual assistant modernizes legal practice by managing appointments, recording case notes, tracking deadlines, sending client reminders, and scheduling follow-ups.

items.title: Restaurant & Takeaway
items.description: Reservation Management Made Easy. Manages table bookings, cancellations, and automated waitlists.

items.title: Personal Trainer
items.description: Power Up Your Training Business. Automates client scheduling, payment reminders, and progress updates.

items.title: Psychologist
items.description: Secure & Smooth Support for Psychologists. Handles patient reminders, intake forms, and secure follow-ups.

items.title: Chiropractor
items.description: Precision Scheduling for Chiropractors. Organizes client visits, recalls, and automates reminders.

items.title: Podiatrist
items.description: Step into better practice management. Tracks appointments, follow-ups, and organizes treatment schedules.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Businesses across industries are saving time and improving customer satisfaction with our virtual receptionist solution.

reviews.review: Integrating the AI receptionist has completely streamlined our booking process. Clients love the instant responses, and I finally have time to focus on growing my business.
reviews.name: Sarah Mitchell

reviews.review: The accuracy and professionalism of the AI assistant have been remarkable. Our clients get immediate help, even after hours, it's like having a full-time receptionist without the overhead.
reviews.name: Carlos Rivera

reviews.review: My clients are impressed that they can book sessions or ask questions at any time. The AI feels natural and keeps my schedule full, I can't imagine going back!
reviews.name: Hannah Lee

reviews.review: We handle dozens of client calls daily, and this system has improved efficiency and response time. The AI assistant integrates perfectly with our CRM, a total gamechanger.
reviews.name: Daniel Cooper

reviews.review: The setup was simple, and within days our clients were interacting with the AI like it was a real person. It's increased bookings and reduced missed calls dramatically.
reviews.name: Olivia Grant

reviews.review: This AI receptionist handles our client inquiries flawlessly. It's efficient, polite, and available 24/7 exactly what we needed to modernize our client support.
reviews.name: Mark Thompson

reviews.review: Since integrating VirtualAssistant.com.au, our plumbing business has become far more efficient. The AI handles calls, bookings, and urgent requests instantly, our customers love the quick updates and professional service.
reviews.name: Dr. James Wilson

reviews.review: The AI receptionist has completely transformed how I manage my beauty clinic. Clients get instant answers and book appointments even while I'm in sessions. It feels like having a full-time assistant who never misses a call.
reviews.name: Emily Rodriguez

reviews.review: VirtualAssistant.com.au has transformed our practice. Calls, bookings, and reminders are handled seamlessly, letting us focus on clients. Patients love the timely followups, and managing session notes is easier than ever like having a professional assistant 24/7.
reviews.name: Robert Chen
